description:
How much water did you really drink today? AquaFaste answers that question — instantly, beautifully, and without ads.

Track every sip with one tap. AquaFaste calculates your personal hydration goal based on your weight and activity level, then helps you hit it every single day. Watch your progress ring fill up, build streaks, and earn achievements along the way.

▸ SMART HYDRATION TRACKING

• One-Tap Logging — Log water, coffee, tea, juice, and 9 more drink types in seconds
• Personal Daily Goal — Calculated from your weight and activity level using EFSA guidelines
• Live Progress Ring — Beautiful animated ring shows exactly where you stand
• Caffeine Tracking — Monitor your caffeine intake alongside hydration
• HealthKit Sync — Your water data flows into Apple Health automatically

▸ HYDRATION SCORE

AquaFaste's unique Hydration Score rates your daily performance from 0 to 100. It considers how consistently you drink, whether you hit your goal, and your overall hydration pattern. Track your score over time and watch it climb.

▸ INSIGHTS & HISTORY

• Weekly & Monthly Charts — See your hydration trends at a glance
• Daily Timeline — Every drink logged with timestamp and amount
• Smart Statistics — Daily average, best day, goal rate, and streaks
• 30-Day Calendar — Visualize your consistency with a heat map

▸ STREAKS & ACHIEVEMENTS

Build daily streaks and unlock 12 achievements across four categories: Streak, Volume, Variety, and Consistency. From "Hydration Starter" (3-day streak) to "Century Club" (100 days). Every milestone celebrates your progress.

▸ SMART REMINDERS

Context-aware notifications that know when you're awake. Reminders every 1-2 hours during waking hours, quiet at night. Streak-at-risk alerts keep you on track. Goal celebration when you hit your target.

▸ SHARE YOUR STATS

Generate beautiful hydration cards with your progress ring, stats, and streak — perfect for Instagram, TikTok, or sending to friends who need a hydration nudge.

▸ PRIVACY FIRST

All data stays on your device. No accounts. No cloud. No ads. Ever. AquaFaste uses privacy-friendly TelemetryDeck analytics — no personal data collected.

▸ SIRI & SHORTCUTS

"Hey Siri, log water in AquaFaste" — hands-free hydration tracking. Check your progress without opening the app.

▸ FREE TO START

Track your hydration with all core features free. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited history, advanced statistics, smart reminders, all themes, CSV export, streak freeze, caffeine insights, and custom drinks. One-time or subscription — your choice, no hidden fees.

Download AquaFaste and start building a healthier hydration habit today.

Terms of Use: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/aquafaste/terms
Privacy Policy: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/aquafaste/privacy
promotionalText: Track every sip with your personal Hydration Score. 12 drink types, caffeine tracking, HealthKit sync, streaks & achievements. No ads, ever.
whatsNew:
What's New in AquaFaste 2.0:

• Beautiful iPad Experience — Fully adaptive layout with optimized typography, larger touch targets, and premium visual polish on every iPad screen
• Smarter Typography — All text scales perfectly across iPhone SE to iPad Pro
• Premium Paywall — Now launches full-screen for a focused upgrade experience
• Modern Empty States — Clean, Apple-native design when you're just getting started
• Refined Animations — Smoother spring animations, symbol effects, and haptic feedback everywhere
• Dark Mode Polish — Improved contrast and adaptive materials for perfect readability
• Under the Hood — Structured logging, performance improvements, and accessibility enhancements

Thank you for staying hydrated with AquaFaste!
